name: Nirvana’s Manohara
description: Nirvana’s Manohara stands as a beacon of luxurious residential design in Khammam's premium Srinagar Colony. Engineered with architectural precision, the structure offers spacious ventilated spaces, supreme build materials, and state-of-the-art safety mechanisms.
features: 100% Vastu Compliant layouts
Premium quality marble & vitrified flooring
Round-the-clock security and CCTV monitoring
Dedicated power backup for common areas
Advanced rain-water harvesting installation

specs.label: Structure
specs.value: R.C.C. Framed Structure to withstand wind & seismic loads

specs.label: Super Structure
specs.value: Solid cement blocks / Light-weight red clay bricks

specs.label: Plastering
specs.value: Double coat smooth finish cement plastering

specs.label: Elevator
specs.value: 6-passenger high-speed automated lift

name: Nirvana’s Venkata Lakshmi Nilayam
description: Located in the bustling neighborhood of KPHB Colony, Venkata Lakshmi Nilayam blends convenience with elegance. Comprising premium residential flats, this structure emphasizes natural lighting, premium fixtures, and a quiet retreat from the city.
features: Strategic central location with easy metro access
Premium teakwood main door frame & shutter
Premium bath fittings (Jaguar or equivalent)
Dedicated covered double-car parking space
Modular kitchen provisioning with high-grade granite counter

specs.value: Teakwood frame main door, UPVC windows with safety grill

specs.label: Flooring
specs.value: 800x800mm premium double charged vitrified tiles

specs.label: Water
specs.value: 24/7 Manjeera & Bore water supply systems

name: Nirvana’s Sirisurya Nivas
description: Sirisurya Nivas is a signature address within Viswambara Enclave, built to define comfortable high-end urban living. Featuring state-of-the-art concrete finishes and modern amenities, it provides an exquisite living standard.
features: Premium building automation components
Extensively landscaped common walkways
EV charging sockets in individual parking bays
Premium solar water heating system
Fully soundproofed French windows in the balcony

name: Nirvana’s IMR Tulasi Vanam
description: IMR Tulasi Vanam is a sprawling community of 38 independent luxury villas located at Muthangi near Patancheru. Combining modern architecture with serene landscaped spaces, this community offers the ultimate luxury villa lifestyle.
features: Gated community with 24/7 manned security checkpoints
Fully equipped luxury clubhouse with swimming pool & gym
Wide internal roads with designer street lights
Underground cabling and drainage systems
Dedicated park and children's play areas

description: OMWEST at Viswambara Enclave features custom-designed spaces with an emphasis on minimalist architectural lines, high-end construction materials, and maximum utility of space.

High ceilings with design plaster finish

name: Nirvana’s Nandanavam
description: Nandanavam is Nirvana's grandest ongoing undertaking till date, spanning a colossal 125,000 Sft of modern residential development. This premium apartment community is designed for next-generation living, incorporating smart home tech, top-tier leisure zones, and lush microclimate gardens.
features: Vast central open space with landscaped theme parks
Fully integrated clubhouse with banquet hall, indoor games, and library
Smart-home automation in all flats (light and appliance controls)
Jogging tracks, yoga decks, and senior citizen relaxation zones
Organic waste converters and solar panels for street lighting
